title: Inductive charging device with coil position feedback
abstract: An inductive charging device including a primary coil and a feedback unit that determines relative coil alignment and regulates the supplied power accordingly.
claims: An inductive charging device comprising: a primary coil; a feedback unit arranged to determine a relative alignment between the primary coil and a secondary coil; and a regulation unit configured to control supplied power by varying a duty cycle based on the determined alignment.
The device according to claim 1, wherein the feedback unit comprises an array of Hall-effect sensors.
The device according to claim 1, wherein the regulation unit varies a duty cycle of the supplied power.
source: DEMO FIXTURE (synthetic, not a real patent)
notes: Synthetic demo sample for the triage UI; not a real EPO record.
